statusLine.command: input=$(cat); model=$(echo "$input" | jq -r '.model.display_name' | sed 's/Claude //' | sed 's/ /-/g'); user=$(whoami); cwd=$(echo "$input" | jq -r '.workspace.current_dir'); branch=$(git -C "$cwd" --no-optional-locks symbolic-ref --short HEAD 2>/dev/null || git -C "$cwd" --no-optional-locks rev-parse --short HEAD 2>/dev/null); used=$(echo "$input" | jq -r '.context_window.used_percentage // empty'); printf "\033[1;35m[%s]\033[0m \033[32m@%s\033[0m ➜ \033[1;34m%s\033[0m" "$model" "$user" "$(basename "$cwd")"; if [ -n "$branch" ]; then printf " \033[1;36m(\033[1;31m%s" "$branch"; if git -C "$cwd" --no-optional-locks ls-files --error-unmatch -m --directory --no-empty-directory -o --exclude-standard ":/*" > /dev/null 2>&1; then printf " \033[1;33m✗"; fi; printf "\033[1;36m)\033[0m"; fi; if [ -n "$used" ]; then printf " \033[1;33m[ctx: %.0f%%]\033[0m" "$used"; fi
